options.name: -auto_ir_fix_effort
options.description: Specifies the IR fixing effort level during stripe generation.

options.name: -critical_path_slack
options.description: Specifies a slack threshold, in nanoseconds, for critical nets during timing-driven reinforce_pg.

options.name: -irdrop_hierarchical_block
options.description: Specifies hierarchical blocks to fix irdrop.

options.name: -irdrop_hierarchical_top_rail_analysis_directory
options.description: Specifies the directory of rail analysis information of full chip for hierarchical blocks to fix irdrop.

options.name: -respect_defined_nets
options.description: Specifies reinforce_pg to respect user defined nets in file.

options.name: -respect_routes
options.description: Specifies whether to honor pre-existing routes check during stripe generation

options.name: -respect_stdcell_geometry
options.description: Specifies the cell type to be respected in via generation.

options.name: -timing_aware_effort
options.description: Specifies the timing effort level during timing-driven reinforce_pg.

options.name: -quiet
options.description: Displays the current settings in Tcl list format only

options.name: -nonDefault
options.description: Displays the current settings which are not default settings
